summary: While the role offers the predictable Monday-to-Friday schedule and excellent work-life balance you prioritize, it presents a significant mismatch with your core cognitive strengths. The position demands high-level quantitative analysis and logical deduction, which are areas where you struggle, making the daily tasks likely to feel overwhelming rather than sustainable. Given the high stress from legal liabilities and the analytical nature of the work, this role would likely compromise your wellbeing despite the favorable hours.
